rootCauseFix.finding: Platform-admin screenshots rendered a red topology JSON parse error when the draft flow had no saved topology response body.
rootCauseFix.rootCause: TopologyViewer parsed every response with r.json() and sent JSON parse failures to the red error path instead of the existing neutral missing-topology state.
rootCauseFix.fix: TopologyViewer now treats TOPOLOGY_NOT_FOUND and empty/non-JSON topology responses as the neutral saved-topology empty state while preserving the real error path for other server failures.
regressionCoverage: client/src/components/topology/__tests__/TopologyViewer.test.tsx: empty draft topology response renders topology-viewer-empty
client/e2e/visual-flow-engine-role-matrix.spec.ts: role matrix rejects visible JSON parse errors and requires either topology empty-state or graph

commands.failure: Unable to find topology-viewer-empty; rendered Error: Unexpected end of JSON input

warnings: Jest emitted the pre-existing unknown setupFilesAfterSetup config warning.

Vite proxy still logs ECONNREFUSED for /api/topology/FLOW-18 and key-status because its proxy target is localhost:3000 while the Docker server is exposed on 33001; the regenerated UI now renders the neutral unsaved-topology state instead of a red JSON error.

commands.command: PowerShell PNG integrity check under docs/e2e-snapshots/visual-flow-engine
PowerShell secret scan over changed phase-3 files

manualInspection.notes: Cross-tenant audit, master canvas, draft preview, and saved-topology empty state render without the previous red JSON parse error.
Mobile platform-admin surface stacks without horizontal overflow; saved-topology empty state is readable and non-error.
Tenant-admin n8n-style palette, canvas, and design-assistant chat are visible and balanced on desktop.
Tenant-admin mobile view preserves the authoring path with readable controls and no visible topology error.
Platform-support read-only canvas renders with disabled controls and a clear escalation path.

visualChecks.responsiveProbe: Role matrix Playwright suite checks root horizontal overflow for every role and viewport.
visualChecks.topologyErrorProbe: Role matrix Playwright suite asserts JSON parse error text is absent and topology section has either empty-state or graph.
visualChecks.redErrorRemediation: The previously observed red Unexpected end of JSON input message is absent from regenerated platform-admin screenshots.

notes: No pre-commit gate was run before commit per Luba's direct instruction in this conversation.
